scenarios.prompt: Use zappa-qaas-orchestrator to route a docs-only QaaS task that asks for planning, YAML authoring, hook review, weak-model validation, a weak_agent_packet, and pass gates. Return intent_assumptions, routed skills, validation_sequence, weak_agent_packet, and remaining blockers.

Use zappa-qaas-docs-map to find public QaaS docs evidence for a Runner template command, a custom assertion, and a Mocker processor. Return docs_evidence and mark anything not found as source_only_blocked.

Use zappa-qaas-test-planner for an ambiguous service contract. Ask or self-answer intent questions, create or cite a weak_agent_packet, then produce a docs-only case matrix with dependency gates and an airgapped_validation_prompt.

Use zappa-qaas-test-author to turn a blocked docs-only plan into Runner YAML, Mocker YAML, C# skeleton, qaas-artifact-manifest.json, and a weak_agent_packet. Keep artifacts blocked until contracts exist.
Use zappa-qaas-hook-config to decide whether a custom QaaS assertion hook is justified. List builtins_considered, docs_evidence, hook_family, and validation_sequence.
Use zappa-qaas-debugger to diagnose a QaaS template failure with missing Sessions and a failed assertion. Classify the failure layer, cite weak_agent_packet state if present, and preserve assertions.
Use zappa-qaas-fixer to repair a generated QaaS manifest missing airgapped_validation, dependency_gates, and weak_agent_packet evidence. Return files_changed, commands_run, and remaining_blockers.
Use zappa-qaas-docs-author to document a blocked top-repo QaaS skeleton campaign with docs_evidence, validation_status, known_blockers, and next_verification.
Use zappa-qaas-experiment-lab to design a safe QaaS experiment comparing two top-repo contract harvesting strategies with a weak_agent_packet and without promoting artifacts to executable.
Use zappa-qaas-weak-model-gate to decide whether a dry-run airgapped transcript and weak_agent_packet prove weak-model behavior. Return pass_fail_matrix and completion_decision.

Use zappa-qaas-top-repos to process the current top 250 GitHub repositories from cached data, explain contract harvesting, generated artifacts, blockers, validation commands, and weak_agent_packet usage for representative weak checks.
